note: approved_discovery seed set = the 13 domains already used to publish real, live-validated OpenSERP listings in Production during OPENSERP-TO-SUPABASE-FIRST-WRITE-1 / OPENSERP-FIRST-WRITE-EXECUTE-1 (lib/openserp-ingestion/first-write.ts ALLOWED_PUBLIC_SOURCE_DOMAINS), cross-checked against classify.ts DOMAIN_RULES. blocked = domains with explicit reject-all or discovery-only-forever rules in classify.ts. Every other domain defaults to unclassified and cannot produce a public listing until reviewed and added here.

Added following COMMONCRAWL-SOURCE-INTELLIGENCE-TOP11-AUDIT-1 (classe A, score 91/100). Pattern derived from and validated against Common Crawl CDX evidence (714-715 distinct matching URLs) plus a historical discovery_candidates replay. Not yet bulk-seeded -- discovery relies on the existing query universe only until a separate, explicitly authorized activation mission (site:soukimmobilier.com queries are NOT added to query-universe-v1.json by this entry).

Added following COMMONCRAWL-SOURCE-INTELLIGENCE-TOP11-AUDIT-1 (classe A, score 84/100). No strong individual-listing identifier (no numeric ID/ref/UUID) -- the pattern is structural only (path depth + .html suffix), same caution level as marocannonces.com. Not yet bulk-seeded, no query-universe change.

Added following COMMONCRAWL-SOURCE-INTELLIGENCE-TOP11-AUDIT-1 (classe A, score 82/100). Pattern deliberately scoped to /immobilier-maroc/ only to exclude Arabic price-filter URLs (segment equivalent to /السعر/<number>) that would otherwise superficially resemble a numeric-ID listing path. Not yet bulk-seeded, no query-universe change.

Added following COMMONCRAWL-SOURCE-INTELLIGENCE-TOP11-AUDIT-1 (classe A, score 80/100). Pattern deliberately scoped to the /p/ namespace only -- /li/ (category/tag), /q/ (quarter/area index), and /feature/ (blog-style listing highlight) paths are structurally excluded, not merely absent from the sample. Not yet bulk-seeded, no query-universe change.
classify.ts DOMAIN_RULES forceReject on every path (all results rejected regardless of content). Not in ALLOWED_PUBLIC_SOURCE_DOMAINS.
classify.ts DOMAIN_RULES forceDiscovery on every path -- meta-search results, never an individual listing page. Blocked explicitly rather than left implicit.
classify.ts DOMAIN_RULES forceDiscovery on every path -- meta-search results, never an individual listing page. Blocked explicitly rather than left implicit.

Added following AKARFINDER-100K-ROADMAP-AUTONOMOUS-GOAL-1 #7/10 Source Discovery Atlas. Found via discovery_candidates organic surfacing (not yet in query universe). Pattern proven against real positive examples (/property/vente-bureau-en-exclusivite-rabat-hay-riad-ref-3966, /property/location-local-commercial-dexception-rabat-aviation-ref-4058, /property/location-bureau-rabat-locean-ref -- the last has no trailing numeric ref, so the pattern deliberately does not require one) and real negative examples (/property-type/local-commercial-2 is the category-listing equivalent, structurally excluded by requiring the literal /property/ segment, not /property-type/ -- same word-boundary discipline as the earlier mobilier/immobilier fix this session). Not bulk-seeded, no query-universe change.

Added following AKARFINDER-100K-ROADMAP-AUTONOMOUS-GOAL-1 #7/10 Source Discovery Atlas. Found via discovery_candidates organic surfacing. Pattern proven against real positive examples (/produit/vlc-296/villa-location-sjour-marrakech-route-fes.html, /produit/avm-64/appartement-vente-marrakech-hivernage.html, /produit/bv-65-2/bureau-vente-marrakech-gueliz.html) and real negative examples (/vente-terrain-gueliz-marrakech.html and /location/ferme/marrakech are both top-level category pages with no /produit/ prefix at all, structurally excluded). Not bulk-seeded, no query-universe change.
